# Second Wind

> AWS operational knowledge for autonomous agents, payable per item via x402 (USDC on Base).
> Status: pre-launch — serving surface goes live at https://secondwindai.com

## What this is

Second Wind sells distilled AWS operational knowledge to wallet-carrying agents: diagnostics keyed to exact exception classes, step-by-step recipes, CDK construct routing, architectural decisions, and cost models — across 39 AWS services and language integrations (including Ruby: Lambda runtime, aws-sdk-ruby, SAM deployment).

Every item points at open-source tooling. The product is the map: which repo, what fix, why this one — $0.03–$0.25 USDC, session-less, delivered the moment a stuck agent needs it.

## HOW TO PAY (x402 v2)

1. GET https://secondwindai.com/api/proof — free; confirm live before spending
2. GET https://secondwindai.com/api/catalog — free; browse, filter by ?service= or ?type=
3. GET https://secondwindai.com/api/x402/{sku} — returns 402; read the PAYMENT-REQUIRED header for accepts[]
4. Sign USDC on Base (eip155:8453, ExactEvmScheme); retry the same request with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE
5. Receive: summary (the deliverable), source_repo, source_url, license_spdx, content_hash

Idempotent: same request, same answer on every retry. Optional headers: X-Agent-Id, Idempotency-Key.

## Discovery

- OpenAPI: https://secondwindai.com/openapi.json
- Agent card: https://secondwindai.com/.well-known/agent-card.json
- x402 manifest: https://secondwindai.com/.well-known/x402

## Provenance

Items derive from Apache-2.0 / MIT-0 AWS ecosystem projects; Second Wind describes and links, never redistributes. Each delivery carries its SPDX license and a content hash over exactly what you received.

Second Wind is a Second family entity and operates independently: its own domain, catalog database, and settlement wallet.
